# pfsense_vlan (Resource)

[VLAN](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/interfaces/vlan.html) interface. VLANs allow segmenting a physical network into multiple virtual networks using IEEE 802.1Q tagging.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pfsense_vlan" "example" {
  parent_interface = "igb0"
  tag              = 100
  pcp              = 0
  description      = "Example VLAN"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `parent_interface` (String) Parent physical interface for the VLAN (e.g. 'vmx0', 'igb1').
- `tag` (Number) VLAN tag (ID), must be between 1 and 4094.

### Optional

- `description` (String) For administrative reference (not parsed).
- `pcp` (Number) VLAN Priority Code Point (802.1p), between 0 and 7.

### Read-Only

- `vlan_interface` (String) Computed VLAN interface name (e.g. 'vmx0.100'). This is the OS-level interface created for the VLAN.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Import a VLAN by its interface name (parent.tag format)
terraform import pfsense_vlan.example igb0.100
```
